targets.rawSQL: SELECT count(*) as total FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'user_prompt'

SELECT count(*) as total FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request'

SELECT round(sum(cast(cost_usd as double)), 4) as total_cost FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request' AND cost_usd IS NOT NULL

SELECT sum(cast(input_tokens as bigint)) + sum(cast(output_tokens as bigint)) as total_tokens FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request'

SELECT count(distinct user_id) as users FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo()))

SELECT round(avg(cast(duration_ms as bigint))/1000.0, 2) as avg_seconds FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request' AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL

SELECT model, count(*) as requests, round(sum(cast(cost_usd as double)), 4) as total_cost, sum(cast(input_tokens as bigint)) as input_tokens, sum(cast(output_tokens as bigint)) as output_tokens, round(avg(cast(duration_ms as bigint))/1000.0, 2) as avg_seconds FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request' AND model IS NOT NULL GROUP BY model ORDER BY total_cost DESC

SELECT event_timestamp, substr(user_id, 1, 12) as user, prompt, prompt_length FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'user_prompt' AND prompt IS NOT NULL ORDER BY event_timestamp DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT substr(user_id, 1, 12) as user, count(*) as requests, round(sum(cast(cost_usd as double)), 4) as total_cost, sum(cast(input_tokens as bigint)) as input_tokens, sum(cast(output_tokens as bigint)) as output_tokens FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request' GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY total_cost DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT substr(session_id, 1, 12) as session, substr(user_id, 1, 12) as user, terminal_type, count(*) as events, min(event_timestamp) as started, max(event_timestamp) as last_activity FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND session_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY session_id, user_id, terminal_type ORDER BY started DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT event_timestamp, substr(user_id, 1, 12) as user, model, duration_ms FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_error' ORDER BY event_timestamp DESC LIMIT 20
